topic: CP analysis for AI Billboard Hot 100 meta-question
summary: CP currently at 0.48, threshold is 0.46. Recent oscillation between 0.39-0.53. Zero-drift simulation gives 58% YES, positive drift gives 76%.
content: The CP for the underlying question (post 40969) has been volatile but recently stabilized around 0.46-0.53. As of Feb 2, CP is at 0.48. The threshold is 46% (strictly greater than). Monte Carlo simulations with daily std of 0.032 give: zero drift 57.7%, mean-revert to 0.45 = 54%, mean-revert to 0.48 = 60%, positive drift = 75.5%. No AI song has hit Hot 100 top 20 yet, but AI songs have hit smaller Billboard charts (Breaking Rust #1 on Country Digital Songs). 878 forecasters = stable CP.
